description:
Add the XDG `bl init` implementation as a new function and gate it with the four conformance tests, but leave `cmd_init` routing through legacy `Store::init`. The flip itself is sibling Phase 1B-5 (after test assertions are migrated).

## Scope

- New module `src/store_init_xdg.rs` with `pub fn init(from, stealth, tasks_dir)` per SPEC-clone-layout Â§3, Â§5, Â§6.4, Â§11. Non-stealth requires `origin`; materializes `trackers/<enc-origin>/balls%2Ftasks/`, seeds `.balls/{tasks,repo.json,project.json}` on the bootstrap branch (solo: no `tracker.json`), commits, best-effort pushes. Stealth writes `~/.config/balls/<nested>/clone.json` (`stealth=true` + `tasks_dir`), no tracker checkout, no origin. SPEC Â§4.1.
- Wrap as `Store::init_xdg` (delegates to the new module) so the conformance tests can reach it through the `Store` surface without the binary path being flipped.
- `Store::discover` routes the no-git branch through `xdg_discover::try_open` so a stealth clone resolves end-to-end.
- `Store::load_config` grows an XDG branch that synthesizes a `Config` view from `RepoJson` + `ProjectConfig` (`integrate â†” delivery`, `gate_command â†” pre_check`) so the 15+ `load_config` call sites stay layout-agnostic through Phase 1B. Migrating individual call sites to `EffectiveConfig` is sibling Phase 1B-6 work.
- New test `tests/conformance_xdg_init.rs` covering Â§14.1 (XDG paths from `bl init`, no `.balls/` at clone root, no `balls:` commit on main), Â§14.4 (bootstrap branch is constant: `repo.json` cannot override), Â§14.15 (stealth init writes `clone.json` keyed by `--tasks-dir`), Â§14.19 half-gated (init + create do not commit on main; full lifecycle gate needs claim XDG too â€” Phase 1C).

## Why it can land alone

`cmd_init` is unchanged in this slice, so existing integration tests still call legacy `bl init`. The new `Store::init_xdg` is exercised only by the four new conformance tests, which build their own clone fixture via `new_repo` + a custom HOME (`bl_xdg` helper).

`Store::discover` change: the no-git â†’ XDG path is additive. Legacy stealth still resolves via `store_legacy::discover_no_git`. XDG stealth gains a path that did not exist before.

`Store::load_config` change: dispatches on `self.layout`. Legacy clones (every existing test) still hit `Config::load(config.json)` byte-identically. XDG clones get the synthesizer. No behavior change for legacy.

## Dependency

Depends on Phase 1B-1 (test helpers). The conformance tests use the per-thread HOME tempdir from the helpers; without it they pollute the user's real `~/.local/state/balls/`.

## Source

The stash on `work/bl-e802` carries this work. Cherry-pick:

- `src/store_init_xdg.rs` (new file).
- `src/store.rs` (`init_xdg`, `discover` no-git tweak, `synthesize_xdg_config`, `state_repo` accessor if landed).
- `src/lib.rs` (`mod store_init_xdg`).
- `tests/conformance_xdg_init.rs` (new file).

Do NOT pull the `cmd_init` edit, the bulk test-assertion rewrites, or the bare-remote new_repo edits into this slice; those are siblings.

## Conformance

Â§14.1, Â§14.4, Â§14.15, Â§14.19 (half-gated).
title: Phase 1B-2: Store::init_xdg + Â§14.1/4/15/19 conformance (cmd_init still legacy)
